    <item>
      <title>Record shooting night can't help Grizzlies break losing streak</title>
      <description>No NBA team has ever made more three-pointers in a game than the Memphis Grizzlies did Monday night. Unlike the other teams that sank 27 or more threes, the Grizzlies couldn't win the game.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Is Nuggets superstar Nikola Jokic still the best player on the planet?</title>
      <description>Let’s get this out of the way: Oklahoma City Thunder Shai Gilgeous-Alexander should win NBA MVP. He’s putting up 30 a game on absurd efficiency, his Thunder have lapped the field and he’s the most reliable closer in the league.</description>
      <pubDate>07 Apr 2026 01:05:37 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/is_nuggets_superstar_nikola_jokic_still_the_best_player_on_the_planet/s1_13132_43683182</link>

        <media:credit> Scott Wachter-Imagn Images </media:credit>

      </media:content>

      <title>Bulls close door on frustrating Arturas Karnisovas era</title>

    <item>
      <title>Eventful Monday leaves Bulls' Billy Donovan in limbo</title>
      <description>Two big events on Monday should have a big effect on Billy Donovan's future. The Chicago Bulls fired Donovan's boss, executive vice president Arturas Karnisovas, and then the University of North Carolina hired Michael Malone as their new head coach.</description>

    <item>
      <title>The 'Most 30-point NBA games at 35+' quiz</title>
